Name: ENEMY_STANDARD_INFO_BANK
Description: Determines the parameters for enemy behavior and collision.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description: The behavior ID this enemy uses.

Fields.Name: Attack Power
Fields.Description: The attack power this enemy has.

Fields.Name: Character Type
Fields.Description: The character type of this enemy.

Fields.Name: Collision Height
Fields.Description: The height of the enemy collision capsule. In metres.

Fields.Name: Collision Radius
Fields.Description: The radius of the enemy collision capsule. In metres.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: The weight of this enemy (for physics).

Fields.Name: Dynamic Friction
Fields.Description: The dynamic friction force used for this enemy (for physics).

Fields.Name: Static Friction
Fields.Description: The static friction force used for this enemy (for physics).

Fields.Name: Initial State: Upper Body
Fields.Description: The initial state of this enemy's upper body.

Fields.Name: Initial State: Action
Fields.Description: The initial state of action this enemy has.

Fields.Name: Y-Axis Rotation Rate
Fields.Description: The rotation rate on the y-axis for this enemy. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Y-Axis Rotation Rate
Fields.Description: The rotation rate on the y-axis for this enemy. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Enable Sidestep
Fields.Description: If ON, the enemy can side-step left and right.

Fields.Name: Enable Ragdoll
Fields.Description: If ON, then ragdoll collision is used for this enemy.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: The total amount of stamina this enemy has.

Fields.Name: Stamina Recovery
Fields.Description: The recovery rate per second for stamina this enemy uses.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption
Fields.Description: The base value of stamina consumption this enemy expends when attacking or guarding.

Fields.Name: Physical Defense
Fields.Description: The base defense against physical damage.
